name: Q7. What happens if I wait?

mainEntity.name: Q7. What happens if I wait?

acceptedAnswer.text: If law firms wait, they risk being left behind as AI assistants increasingly become a primary source of recommendations for legal services. AI models recommend a small number of recognized and trusted firms, and if a firm isn't positioned to be in those answers, AI will recommend competitors, leading to missed client opportunities.
